description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Extra Travelling Time on the Airport Express  Tung Chung Line
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 機場快綫及東涌綫額外行車時間

2024-06-12T12:04:00.CONTENT_EN:
Extra travelling time can be expected on the Airport Express amp; Tung Chung Line. 
Please allow more time for travel.
2024-06-12T12:04:00.CONTENT_CN:
機場快綫及東涌綫列車預計需要額外行車時間， 
請為行程預留充裕時間。

2024-06-12T12:16:00.CONTENT_EN:
Due to a signalling fault near Sunny Bay Station, Airport Express amp; Tung Chung Line trains will operate at a slower speed from Sunny Bay Station to Tsing Yi Station. This could extend the total journey time on the Airport Express amp; Tung Chung Line between Hong Kong Station and Tung Chung Station / AsiaWorld-Expo Station by 3-5 minutes. 
For more details, please visit: https://www.td.gov.hk/en/special_news/spnews.htm
In-town Check-in service close out time is extended from 90 minutes to 120 minutes until further notice.
2024-06-12T12:16:00.CONTENT_CN:
由於欣澳站附近有信號故障，機場快綫及東涌綫列車駛經欣澳站至青衣站路段時需要慢駛，機場快綫及東涌綫來往香港站及東涌站/博覽館站的行車時間預計需要額外3-5分鐘。
詳情請參看: https://www.td.gov.hk/tc/special_news/spnews.htm
市區預辦登機服務的截止時間，將由飛機起飛前的90分鐘改為飛機起飛前的120分鐘，直至另行通知。

2024-06-12T12:41:00.CONTENT_EN: The signalling fault near Sunny Bay Station on the Airport Express amp; Tung Chung Line has been repaired. Train operations can now be safely resumed. Normal train service is gradually resuming.
